holdings.infoBox: DRIV is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 5.58%, NVIDIA at 2.72%, Nebius Group at 2.68%, Alphabet at 2.67%, and QUALCOMM at 2.62%.

overview.description: The Global X Autonomous & Electric Vehicles ETF (DRIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index that uses artificial intelligence to select global stocks involved in the development, production, or supporting technology of autonomous and electronic vehicles. DRIV was launched on Apr 13, 2018 and is issued by Global X.
